readings.summary: Moses meets the Lord on Mount Sinai.

readings.citation:
Dn 3:52, 53, 54, 55, 56
Glory and praise for ever!
readings.antiphon:
Dn 3:52, 53, 54, 55, 56
Glory and praise for ever!

readings.summary: Live in peace with one another.

Glory to the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit;
to God who is, who was, and who is to come.
Jesus tells Nicodemus of the Father's love.

antiphons.text:
Blest be God the Father,
and the Only Begotten Son of God,
and also the Holy Spirit,
for he has shown us his merciful love.

Since you are children of God,
God has sent into your hearts the Spirit of his Son,
the Spirit who cries out: Abba, Father.
